retry_reason: The operation does nothing if the route is not in the list; there is no failure to retry.
contract_summary: This function removes a route from its list and releases one reference. It checks whether the route is still linked (rt->node.next != NULL) before unlinking and dropping the reference. After a successful call, the caller must not use the rt pointer because its refcount has been decremented. The function is safe to call even if the route has already been removed (no-op). It represents a combined 'unlink and decrement' step, typically used during cleanup or route deletion, and must be paired with an earlier reference acquisition.
